ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "size_in" TEXT /* Size label in inches (IN) */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Size in European (EU) standard */,
  "aus_uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in Australian/UK (AUS/UK) standard */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size in United States (US) standard */,
  "chest_in" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "seat_in" TEXT /* Seat measurement in inches */,
  "hip_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_in" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size conversion entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size conversion entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the sale amount is denominated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order amount is denominated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "size_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size preference entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size preference entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)
